title: stelis menippe
intro: Stelis menippe, also known as Menippe stelis, is a species of flowering orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stelis menippe include its potential to help manage conditions such as fever, respiratory issues, and wounds, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Stelis menippe is typically prepared as an herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, although other preparations may vary depending on the specific traditional medicine practice.
